name: HRR_MEETINGS
description: The meeting table covers the basic information about the meeting.

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Unique primary key that identifies each distinct meeting record in this table.

columns.Name: USE_POT_ASSESS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether Potential Assessment will be used or not.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the questionnaire that should be used in the potential assessment in the meeting.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: DASHBOARD_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRR_DASHBOARD_TMPLS_B.

columns.Name: MEETING_PURPOSE
columns.Comments: A larger text area to capture the facilitators instructions and comments for the meeting participants.

columns.Name: MEETING_TITLE
columns.Comments: A brief description of the talent review meeting to help distinguish it from other meeting instances.

columns.Name: MEETING_INSTRUCTIONS
columns.Comments: An instructions text for the talent review meeting.

columns.Name: MEETING_DATE
columns.Comments: Date to indicate when the actual meeting will take place.

columns.Name: MEETING_LEADER_ID
columns.Comments: The individual at the top of the organization under review.

columns.Name: MEETING_FACILITATOR_ID
columns.Comments: The person responsible for scheduling, managing and conducting the talent review meeting.  This could be the Business Unit Leader or an individual from the HR department assigned to assist the Business Unit Leader.  The facilitator will be the only person who can create, update, view, and launch the talent review dashboard.

columns.Name: MEETING_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the meeting

columns.Name: MEETING_SUBMIT_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the meeting configuration status of a talent review meeting.

columns.Name: MEETING_FACILITATOR_NOTES
columns.Comments: Indicates if notes can be captured for this talent review meeting.

columns.Name: MEETING_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Organization for the review meeting

columns.Name: DATA_SUBMIT_DATE
columns.Comments: The deadline for data used during the talent review meeting to be entered in the various source systems by the meeting participants.

columns.Name: DATA_SUBMIT_DATE#01
columns.Comments: The deadline for data used during the talent review meeting to be entered in the various source systems by the meeting participants.

columns.Name: MEETING_SUBMISSION_DATE
columns.Comments: The timestamp when the meeting was actually submitted.

columns.Name: PREF_REVIEW_QUALIFIER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_QUALIFIERS_B.

columns.Name: DATA_VALIDITY_CODE
columns.Comments: The data validity guideline is intended to help the participants determine if the data already captured in the system is still valid for the talent review meeting.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_MATRIX_MGMT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether matrix managers should be included as reviewers for the meeting.

columns.Name: ENABLE_CALENDAR_INVITE
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate meeting invite need to be created.

columns.Name: MEETING_END_DATE
columns.Comments: The timestamp when the meeting ends.

columns.Name: MEETING_LOCATION
columns.Comments: URL or physical location of the meeting.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITATION_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Additional info for meeting invite.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
